ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the region for mapping and location services */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the region */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the official website or information page of the region */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the trail is located */,
  "trail_name" TEXT /* Name of the trail */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trail */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the trail in miles */,
  "elevation_gain" INTEGER /* Total elevation gain of the trail in feet */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the trail (e.g., easy, moderate, difficult) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the trail information was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the trail */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Name or description of the starting point of the trail */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Name or description of the endpoint of the trail */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the trail */,
  "trail_conditions" TEXT /* Current conditions of the trail (e.g., open, closed, partially closed) */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date the trail was last inspected */,
  "trail_type" TEXT /* Type of trail (e.g., loop, out-and-back, point-to-point) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trails_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail segment */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trail the segment belongs to */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the trail segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trail segment */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trail segment in miles */,
  "cumulative_distance" REAL /* Cumulative distance from the start of the trail to the end of the segment in miles */,
  "elevation_change" INTEGER /* Elevation change of the trail segment in feet */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the segment */,
  "start_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the start of the segment */,
  "end_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the end of the segment */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the segment */,
  "trail_conditions" TEXT /* Current conditions of the segment (e.g., open, closed, partially closed) */,
  "trail_type" TEXT /* Type of segment (e.g., loop, out-and-back, point-to-point) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_segments_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hiker, trail maintainer, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hikes" (
  "hike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hike */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the hike */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail the hike was on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the hike started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the hike ended */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the hike in miles */,
  "total_elevation_gain" INTEGER /* Total elevation gain of the hike in feet */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the hike */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the hike */,
  "start_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the start of the hike */,
  "end_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the end of the hike */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken to complete the hike */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the hike */,
  "trail_conditions" TEXT /* Trail conditions during the hike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hikes_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hike_segments" (
  "hike_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hike segment */,
  "hike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hike the segment is part of */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail segment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the segment during the hike */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the segment during the hike */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered in the segment during the hike in miles */,
  "elevation_change" INTEGER /* Elevation change in the segment during the hike in feet */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the hike segment */,
  "start_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the start of the hike segment */,
  "end_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the end of the hike segment */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the hike segment */,
  "trail_conditions" TEXT /* Trail conditions during the hike segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hike_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hike_segments_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES trail_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hike_segments_hike_id FOREIGN KEY ("hike_id") REFERENCES hikes ("hike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail the maintenance activity is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance activity was performed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., clearing, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the maintenance activity */,
  "start_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the start of the maintenance activity */,
  "end_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the end of the maintenance activity */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the maintenance activity */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time taken to complete the maintenance activity */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used during the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_maintenance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_maintenance_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the trail (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the review */,
  "start_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the start of the review */,
  "end_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the end of the review */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the review */,
  "trail_conditions" TEXT /* Trail conditions during the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
